div.p: Free instant access, no credit card required.

div.t-att-class: {'cy-app-install-div-wrap': state.moduleSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.moduleSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '') }
{'cy-app-install-highlighted-phone': state.moduleSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.moduleSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '') }

select.t-att-class: {'cy-app-install-select-wrap': state.moduleSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.moduleSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '') }

div.t-if: state.moduleSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.moduleSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')
state.moduleSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.moduleSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')
state.technicalSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.technicalSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')
state.technicalSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.technicalSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')
state.categorySearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.categorySearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')
state.categorySearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.categorySearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')

input.name: search
input.t-att-class: {'cy-app-install-input-conditional': state.technicalSearchTerm !== null and Object.values(state.technicalSearchTerm).some(term => term !== null and term !== '') }

t.t-if: state.autoCompleteItems !== null and Object.values(state.autoCompleteItems).some(term => term !== null and term !== '')

div.p: Free instant access, no credit card required.
